title: Horizon Hotel

{{Quote|This is pretty comfortable. I always think of Taris as a dead world.|[[Goran Beviin]], regarding the Hotel Horizon's lavish interior|<ref name="Bloodlines" />}}
The '''Horizon Hotel''' was a plush [[Hotel/Legends|hotel]] in operation on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] by the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. Located in the wealthy neighborhoods of the [[Upper City]], the interior of the Horizon Hotel was decorated with polished [[Tree/Legends|wood]] and [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|expensive]] upholstery. The hotel [[Cantina/Legends|bar]] was furnished with several tables and a number of stools along the bar's counter for patrons to sit at; [[Napkin/Legends|napkins]] were also provided for the guests' convenience. The Horizon Hotel's menu included mugs of [[Tarisian ale]] and [[deep-fried coin-crabs]], and the hotel bar had a formal dress code that disallowed helmets.<ref name="Bloodlines" />

By 40 ABY, the Horizon Hotel's bar was [[Bartender/Legends|staffed]] by a middle-aged [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], who dressed in an expensive, high-collared uniform while he worked. That year, the veteran [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] [[Goran Beviin]] met with reigning [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|''Mand'alor'']] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] at the hotel bar. Though the two men stood out from the rest of the Horizon's lavishly dressed patrons, the barman declined to press the issue of the establishment's dress code with either of the [[Mandalorian armor/Legends|armored]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]]. Beviin ordered a large [[Glass/Legends|glass]] of Tarisian [[Ale/Legends|ale]] and a bowl of deep-fried [[coin-crab]]s while at the bar, which he enjoyed while delivering news of Fett's estranged [[Ailyn Vel|daughter's]] whereabouts to the Mandalorian leader. When it came [[Time/Legends|time]] for him to depart the Horizon Hotel, Beviin scooped what remained of his order of coin-crabs into a napkin and took them with him to finish later.<ref name="Bloodlines" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Horizon Hotel was first introduced to the ''[[Star Wars]]'' universe in the ''[[Star Wars: Legacy of the Force]]'' novel [[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines|''Bloodlines'']], written by [[Author/Legends|author]] [[Karen Traviss]] and published [[August 29]], [[2006]].<ref name="Bloodlines" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' {{1st}}
